name: nabcor
description: Evidence-aware AI Creative Operating System — deterministic truth kernel (Phase 1A), provider-neutral gateway kernel (Phase 1B.1), deterministic structured-truth analysis (Phase 1B.2), authenticated human gates (Phase 1B.3-1B.5), and the configured-but-live-disabled Anthropic provider implementation (Phase 1C.1, DEC-0018/DEC-0019). One provider configured, live invocation disabled; zero model calls, zero spend.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:contracts && npm run validate:brain && npm run validate:repository && npm run validate:packet && npm run validate:chain && npm run validate:language && npm run typecheck && npm run test:runtime
